Document:
# Parole
- 1.
 To ensure the continued output of departments, security is encouraged to provide Parole when sensible.

 1.1
 Parole may be applied as the result of a trial, or at the Warden or Head of Security's discretion. - 2.
 Paroled Prisoners are to be released from Security and marked "Paroled" in the Criminal Records System. - 3.
 The Warden or Head of Security may request the paroled individual to "check in" at security during the duration of their parole. 3.1
 Failure to comply in under 5 minutes is to be considered breach of custody.

 3.2
 This should not be done more than every 15 minutes.

 3.3
 Paroled individuals may be searched at all times by Security. - 4.
 When the sentence is up, the parolee may return to security to retrieve any temporarily confiscated equipment, such as tools.
